pr.title: feat(proxy): Codex → Anthropic API router with upstream compatibility normalization
pr.body:
## Summary

- Add full request/response format conversion pipeline for Codex CLI clients talking to Anthropic-compatible upstreams (e.g. Xiaomi MiMo, third-party Anthropic proxies)
- Add request body normalizer that fixes strict upstream rejections for `tool_choice` format and missing/empty message content blocks
- Add frontend configuration support for Anthropic API format in Codex provider settings

## Changes

### Backend (Rust)

**New modules:**
- `transform_anthropic_to_codex.rs` — Anthropic → OpenAI response streaming conversion (Chat Completions + Responses API)
- `streaming_codex_anthropic.rs` — SSE streaming adapter for Anthropic upstream responses back to Codex client format

**Modified modules:**
- `forwarder.rs` — New `codex_to_anthropic` routing path with Anthropic auth (x-api-key), URL building, and `normalize_anthropic_request_body()` for upstream compatibility:
  - `tool_choice`: string shorthand (`"auto"`) → Anthropic object format (`{"type": "auto"}`)
  - `messages[].content`: inject placeholder for missing, null, or empty-text content blocks
- `handlers.rs` — Handle Codex requests targeting Anthropic endpoints, response streaming dispatch
- `codex.rs` — `codex_provider_uses_anthropic_api()`, `should_convert_codex_to_anthropic()`, `extract_anthropic_api_key_for_codex()`, `build_anthropic_url_for_codex()`
- `transform.rs` — `openai_chat_request_to_anthropic()` for Chat Completions → Anthropic Messages conversion
- `transform_responses.rs` — `responses_request_to_anthropic()` for Responses API → Anthropic Messages conversion
- `stream_check.rs` — Extended for Anthropic streaming detection

### Frontend (TypeScript)

- `CodexFormFields.tsx` / `ProviderForm.tsx` — Added `api_format` selector for Codex providers (native / anthropic / openai_chat)
- `useProviderActions.ts` — Handle `api_format` metadata in provider save flow
- `types.ts` / `providerConfigUtils.ts` — Extended types and config utilities

## Test plan

- [x] `pnpm typecheck` passes
- [x] `pnpm format:check` passes
- [x] `pnpm test:unit` — 241 tests pass
- [x] `cargo fmt --check` passes
- [x] `cargo clippy --all-targets` passes
- [x] `cargo test` — 1333 tests pass (including 20 new `normalize_anthropic_request_body` tests)
- [ ] Manual test: Codex CLI → proxy → MiMo with single-turn request
- [ ] Manual test: Codex CLI → proxy → MiMo with multi-turn conversation
- [ ] Manual test: Codex CLI → proxy → Anthropic native API (regression)
pr.author: ManLOK-Chu
